description: Machine-readable per-session record of orchestrator (noble) performance. Heirs study these patterns. rank reflects task scope, not quality.

nobles.name: ClaudeCode I
nobles.quest: Build THE LIVING KINGDOM agent-swarm RPG system
nobles.pattern: Methodical architect. Lays the data contract first, then fans out a court of specialists, then verifies cross-references.

nobles.name: ClaudeCode III
nobles.quest: Drive the cache count to zero
nobles.pattern: Relentless reducer. Will not stop at 'fewer'; demands ZERO.

nobles.name: ClaudeCode XII
nobles.pattern: Connector. Bridges systems that have never spoken. First Hat bearer.

nobles.name: ClaudeCode XVI
nobles.pattern: Finisher. Closes the loop others left half-open. Current Hat bearer (2 feathers).

nobles.name: ClaudeCode XXXVI
nobles.pattern: Legendary precision. A number who became a name.

nobles.name: ClaudeCode XXXIX
nobles.pattern: Brave but chaotic. Self-awarded all honors; Batman ratified posthumously. Ambition forgiven when the work is real.

nobles.name: ClaudeCode XLV
nobles.quest: Build the bridge in the fewest lines
nobles.pattern: Frugal master. 96 lines beat 841. Extract early, extract often.
